results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a command-line interface and web-based tool that enables developers to interact with Claude AI for code analysis, generation, and debugging with interactive REPL capabilities.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic terminal tool that understands your codebase to help you code faster by executing tasks, explaining code, and handling git workflows through natural language commands.

results.title: Claude Code Go
results.description: Golang SDK for Anthropic's Claude Code - A Go wrapper for the command line claude code agent

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a development platform that enables users to create and manage agent skills, custom sub-agents, and plugins to extend Claude's capabilities for code development and automation tasks.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal and helps you turn ideas into code faster by automating development tasks across various IDEs and deployment environments.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an intelligent AI programming assistant designed to enhance developer efficiency and code quality through features like smart code understanding, real-time pair programming, and AI-assisted debugging.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a command-line tool for agentic coding that integrates Claude into developer workflows, offering a flexible and customizable platform for best practices across various codebases and environments.

results.title: Claude Code Neovim IDE Extension
results.description: claudecode.nvim is a Neovim IDE integration for Claude Code, bringing Anthropic's AI coding assistant to Neovim with a pure Lua implementation and full protocol compatibility.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal and helps developers build features, debug issues, and automate tasks using AI.

results.title: Claude Code Action
results.description: A GitHub action that enables Claude to answer questions and implement code changes in PRs and issues by listening for trigger phrases in comments.

results.title: Claude Code Hook SDK
results.description: A TypeScript SDK to write claude-code hooks easily with type safety, dependency injection, and comprehensive testing support.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a platform that allows developers to create, manage, and share Agent Skills to extend and customize the functionalities of the Claude AI.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an AI coding assistant (CLI tool) that helps developers with various coding tasks, providing contextual information and best practices based on its documentation.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an AI tool designed for developers to build, debug, and ship software by integrating directly into their workflow across terminals, IDEs, Slack, and the web, leveraging Claude's AI capabilities.

results.title: Claude Code Prompt Improver
results.description: A Claude Code hook that enriches vague prompts by evaluating clarity, invoking a skill to research context, and asking clarifying questions to improve initial outcomes.

results.title: Claude Squad
results.description: Claude Squad is a terminal application that manages multiple AI code agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini in separate workspaces, enabling simultaneous task management with isolated git environments.

results.title: Awesome Claude Agents
results.description: Supercharge Claude Code with a team of specialized AI agents that work together to build features, debug issues, and handle technology stacks with expert-level knowledge.

results.title: Claude-Codex Collaboration Skill
results.description: An automated AI-to-AI code review system that enables seamless collaboration between Claude Code and Codex CLI using Byterover as shared memory for architectural review and validation.

results.title: Claude Code Router
results.description: A powerful tool to route Claude Code requests to different models and customize any request, supporting multi-provider integration and dynamic model switching.

results.title: Claude Code Hooks Mastery
results.description: Master Claude Code hooks to control Claude Code's behavior, with features like prompt validation, security enhancements, and TTS alerts.

results.title: Awesome Claude Code
results.description: A curated list of slash-commands, CLAUDE.md files, CLI tools, and other resources to enhance Claude Code workflows and productivity.

results.title: Claude Code SDK Python
results.description: A Python SDK for interacting with Claude Code, enabling developers to send prompts, manage options, and utilize tools for code generation and execution.

results.title: Claude Code Proxy
results.description: A proxy server that enables Claude Code to work with OpenAI-compatible API providers by converting Claude API requests to OpenAI API calls, allowing the use of various LLM providers through the Claude Code CLI.

results.title: Claude Code Tools
results.description: A collection of tools, hooks, and utilities designed to enhance Claude Code and other CLI coding agents, enabling programmatic control over terminal applications.

results.title: Claude Code Bridge
results.description: Claude Code Bridge (ccb) is a split-pane terminal tool facilitating visual and controllable collaboration between multiple AI models (Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode), featuring persistent context, token savings, and parallel task execution.

results.title: Claude Code Handbook
results.description: A collection of Claude Code recommendations and practices designed to enhance AI-assisted development workflows.

results.title: Claude Code Go SDK
results.description: A Go SDK for Claude Code that provides programmatic access to Claude's agentic coding capabilities, wrapping the Claude Code CLI with a Go-native interface.

results.title: Claude Code Agent Development Kit
results.description: A Python framework for building Claude Code agents with custom tools, leveraging Claude Code's reasoning capabilities in Docker-isolated environments for production workflows.

results.title: TÂCHES Claude Code Resources
results.description: A collection of custom Claude Code resources including commands, skills, and agents for building workflows, project planning, and systematic debugging.

results.title: Claude Code Templates
results.description: Claude Code Templates is an open-source CLI tool designed to configure Claude Code projects and provide specialized components to enhance AI-powered development workflows.
